name: chrI_R_telomere
description: R-arm telomere of S. pombe chromosome I. S. pombe telomeres are tandem arrays of the degenerate hexanucleotide consensus TTAC(C/G)(0-1)(C/G)(1-8), specifically variants of TTACAG(GG)1-8 / TTACACGG, averaging ~300 bp of array per end. Immediately interior is the subtelomere with TAS1 repeats, rapidly-evolving SPAC paralog cassettes, and degenerate telomere-like sequences. ASM294v2 represents most telomeres with ~5 kb of nominal terminal sequence.
expected_copy_count: ~50-100 copies of the degenerate TTAC(C/G)(0-1)(C/G)(1-8) repeat per chromosome end (~300 bp array); length is telomerase- and Taz1-regulated
